title_en: Genie 2: A large-scale foundation world model
abstract_en: Genie 2 explores interactive, controllable environment generation at scale.
abstract_zh: Genie 2 探索了大规模、可交互、可控的环境生成。
editorial_summary_zh: 把世界模型从预测器推进到可交互环境生成器。
editorial_summary_en: Pushes world models toward interactive generated environments.
why_it_matters: It reframes world models as a usable interface for simulation and agent training.
